You can built two main teams around two Awakeners. Tawil and Castor.

Tawil/Caecus/Flex/Flex 
Flex: Ramona/Nautila/Karen/Ogier/Celeste

Castor/Jenkin/Flex/Flex
Flex: Winkle/Ogier/Nautila/Caecus/Goliath
Keep in mind that you can only mix 2 Realms.

Nautila and Jenkin are both good. Ones a Survive and the other a DPS. 4th can be Celeste/Celeste/Ogier. The best Purple Awakener is Ogier. Ramona is always a solid flex support with the ability to draw any card and set it to 0, and generate Skey for Posse. Doll and Lotan get overshadowed. Doll doesnt heal enough, and her only redeeming quality is 2 turn Weakness. Lotan just doesn’t scale well, and works at OE(OverExalt). Ogier is a STR stacker with massive shields.

You have all the “solid” Standard Awakeners, and would only pull for further Enlightenments. I recommend pulling for Wheels.

Ok real answer explanation is such:
Standard pulls are a scarce commodity. You will fill out the awakers just offrating faster than you will complete wheels. Wheels are so important for functional teams that the earlier you start maxxing them out the better.
As a whale myself I have all the characters I play at the dupe count I could ever want, but I'm months away from completing the wheels I need. I only have a few maxxed. Since ur not as big a spender u will just be developing both at a good rate.
Ok, I'll start my eternal suffering then. Thanks!

For a castor team, would I need to enter ultra space at all?
Uhhhhhhhh…….
Ultra Turn is good if you can survive and get it
If not, just Annihilate every turn
You can also stall Ultra Turn via, play a card -> Annihilate -> Play your turn -> Do it again

You always edge ultra space for all ultra teams.
Fill ultra bar upto 4 or 5 slots then pop annihilation.
At boss / elite, enter ultra space turn 1.
Oh aight
I've been doing just that, but was wondering what's so good abt ultra space cuz I read that DMG is reduced unless it's pure
I don't remember Castor kit but doesn't he have permanent damage increase after play some 0 cost?
Well if he doesn't, you can still use the ultra space turn to use  posse / rouse awakers
It’s reduced if not all Ultra or Mixed with Chaos. The point still stands that one extra turn can decide a fight, or end a fight instantly.

<@452731110556696596> <@317871635736690698> 

Playing "Onyx Plume" for the first time each turn inflicts 840% of Castor's ATK as "Corrosion" on the target and gives Castor 10 Aliemus.
For every 1% of DMG Amplification Castor has, the Base amount of "Corrosion" inflicted increases by 1%.

After the battle, "Corrosion" inflicted by Castor permanently increases by 20% during this Exploration.

"Corrosion" inflicted in Boss Battles doubles.

After inflicting "Corrosion", Castor's DMG output increases by 5% of the amount of "Corrosion" inflicted this turn.

DMG dealt by Castor does not remove "Corrosion".
His e3 damage increase, is it temp or not
I thought it was per battle
Final Dmg
Lemme double check
If it's for the battle then ultra space works
Per Battle 10% Final Dmg
https://tenor.com/view/lotta-words-wow-thats-a-lot-of-words-not-reading-that-not-reading-wow-gif-26878516

<@317871635736690698> What Aurora means to say is that at E3 Castor gains a passive that every 3 Onyx Plumes played, he gains 1 Arithma and a additional 10% Final Dmg for this battle. Aurora wants you to fill Ultra Space with Onyx Plumes and then enter a mini boss/boss fight with 4 Onyx Plumes. Thus when triggering Ultra Turn on Turn 1, you gain 10% Additional Final Dmg near Instantaneously.

Yeah I was thinking this is probably what most people do, thanks.

Ultra: Retain 100% Ultra Turn Effects(not reduce)/Gain 10% Crit Dmg

Other ways to use ultra space, wait out vulnerability debuff on yourself.
Maintain shield so you can have 2 end turn worth of Castor shield
Ultra space counts as starting that turn again so if you have something which starts on turn 1 like the strike pizza or due ex machina pizza then it will trigger again in ultra space
There's other things like relics which works at the start of specific turns but you can figure that out when you see it

<@388033054129782784> The problems stems from your team having no weakness application, and no real shielding besides Caecus. Tawil generates Skey and Ramona as well, while both dont have a consistent Weakness/Defensive skill. Miryam is a battery/scaling Awakener. Caecus is your only “defensive” Awakener.

A lot of people don't generally rely very much on... getting killed in general by the content... but if it happens to you often then Celeste makes a decent cushion to not have that happen. If she does nothing other than generate a free arithmetica point here and there, she's not negatively impacting your freedom to play exclusively Tawil's cards very much, and she doesn't really do anything with her wheel either, so not much is gained or lost there either...
Celeste can throw out a weakness if it really matters, and if you have E1 Celeste, that weakness - though high cost - should have retain so you have it when you actually need it

Alright. This is what’s gonna shape your defensives.

Pollux’s first card played each turn gains a additional 200% Dmg and 50% Shield based on (I forgot).

Castor Plumes have retain(so they stay in your hand), when keep in hand when you end turn, you gain additional shield for each Onyx Plume in hand.
Pollux’s Scared Hearts and Exalt refresh his passive.
For Sacred Hearts, on their third play/cycle, they refresh the passive.
For Exalt, its on Exalt, the passive refreshes

Winkle job is to feed Aliemus, and when you are playing defensice and want to survive, feeding Castor for a BIG shield, and putting three Onyx Plumes in your deck will help you survive, as long as you keep them in your hand.
Winkles job is to apply Weakness, and a little bit of shielding
Ramona

Ramonas Exalt can be used offensively, but also defensively. Drawing Castor’s 2 Cost that gives you shield and applies Weakness to all enemies can save your life. If there is no Castor 2 cost, Winkle 2 cost also applies Weakness, but without the shield.
Furthermore

Ramona has a Enlightenment that allows her cards to be not played, but still gain the Keyflare from them for your Posse. Which is amazing since you dont want to prioritize Ramona’s cards, but rather Castor’s or Pollux’s.

You want to be prioritizing putting your Castor and Pollux Cards into Ultra Turn, and thats your “Burst Turn” angle.
Now Ultra Turn mechanics of Stlaling
Stalling*
Since some people dont know
How Ultra Realm FULLY works

You can have 4 cards in the Ultra Turn, then play one for 5 Cards, thus enabling Ultra Turn. If you click on the little void button next to the bar, you can Annihilate a card, returning it back to 4 Cards. Annihilating a card in Ultra Turn  grants you 1 Insight(Draw One and One More Arithma). Then you can rinse and repeat, until you need the Ultra Turn for a big Burst turn or to stop a big Attack from the enemy. Shields carry over from current turn to Ultra turn btw.

Playing a Onyx Plume applies a Corrosion effect scaling 840% off of Castor’s Attack. The First Onyx Plume played each turn grants 10 Aliemus. For every 1% DMP AMPLIFICATION stack increase the base amount of Corrosion by 1%. After every battle, the Corrosion applied by Castor increases by 20%. Corrosion inflicted in Boss fights are doubled. After inflicting Corrosion, Castor’s Dmg Increases by 5% of the Corrosion applied this turn. Damage dealt by Castor does not remove Corrosion.

Corrosion: For every 1 Dmg You Do Remove 3 Stacks of Corrosion and Deal that Amount of Dmg Times 3. 

Basically 3 times your damage and remove 3 times your damage of Corrosion stacks.

Corrosion Damage goes Through Shields and Immunities.

Pollux Rouse, makes it so he gains Sin Marks, which make him do a % more bleed based off his damage. The % scales further as he gains more Sin Marks. Little bit of Pollux Rouse Info.

Castor Rouse makes it so he gains 100% CRIT RATE, AND, you’re normal passive applies Corrosion only on the First Onyx Plume that hits a enemy. What happens if you consume all the stacks, then no more damage multiplier. HOWEVER, his Rouse makes it so EVERY Onyx Plume applies Corrosion that can STACK. Thus, you never deal run out of stacks to multiply your damage, as long as you have enough Onyx Plumes.
